session.user:
Run the tests for the reserve_pypi_name module from the erk-dev package directory and report all output:
``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev && uv run pytest tests/test_reserve_pypi_name.py -v 2>&1 ```
Report all output including pass/fail status for each test and any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the tests for the reserve_pypi_name module and report all output.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run reserve_pypi_name tests with verbose output

session.assistant:
pytest failed: Circular import error during test collection
The test module cannot be collected due to a circular import detected in the codebase:
**Error Summary:** - Test file: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev/tests/test_reserve_pypi_name.py` - Error type: `ImportError` - Root cause: Circular import between modules
**Import Chain (circular dependency detected):** 1. `tests/test_reserve_pypi_name.py` (line 7) imports from `erk_dev.commands.reserve_pypi_name.command` 2. `src/erk_dev/commands/reserve_pypi_name/command.py` (line 12) imports from `erk_dev.cli.output` 3. `src/erk_dev/cli/__init__.py` (line 32) tries to import `reserve_pypi_name_command` from the partially-initialized `erk_dev.commands.reserve_pypi_name.command` module
**Affected Files:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev/src/erk_dev/commands/reserve_pypi_name/command.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev/src/erk_dev/cli/__init__.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev/src/erk_dev/cli/output.py`
The circular import must be resolved before the tests can be collected and run.
